message:
DCE optimization: ComptimeStringMap for type inference, split postfix.zig

- expressions.zig: 15 → 0 string comparisons (StaticStringMap)
- postfix.zig: 614 → split into 4 files (all < 300 lines)
- fnv_hash.zig: Add standalone hash function for comptime switches
